text:
Activity 4 : Draw
two
line segments
BC
and EF of
two different
lengths, say 3
cm
and 5 cm respectively. Then, at the points B
and C respectively, construct angles PBC
and QCB of s
some r
 measures, say, 60°
and 40°. Also, at the points
s E and F, construct
angles REF
and SFE of 60°
and 40°
respectively (see Fig. 6.23).
